xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value2" arr_length="15">
    <Field position="0" name="date" />
    <Field position="1" name="msg" />
    <Field position="2" name="logid" />
    <Field position="3" name="device_id" org_name="deviceid" />
    <Field position="4" name="dstn_ip" org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="5" name="src_ip" org_name="src" />
    <Field position="6" name="pri" />
    <Field position="7" name="type" />
    <Field position="8" name="src_port" org_name="srcport" />
    <Field position="9" name="subtype" />
    <Field position="10" name="prtc" org_name="proto" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="11" name="dstn_port" org_name="dstport" />
    <Field position="12" name="action" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="13" name="device_name" org_name="devname" />
    <Field position="14" name="time" convert_tag="[[@replaceAll('T',' ')]]" />
    <Field position="15" name="vendor" convert_tag="[[@set('fortinet')]]" />
    <Field position="16" name="model" convert_tag="[[@set('fgt')]]" />
    <Field position="17" name="logtype" convert_tag="[[@set('event')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v4')]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="original_log" convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="parser_info" convert_tag="[[@set('[Fortinet]_fgt_system_v4_keyvalue')]]" />
    <Field position="21" name="eqp_type" convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
